Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene.reason: This summary matches the evidence and interpretation presented for the TTG1 ortholog.

Terminal_Metabolite.reason: The ortholog is linked to PA biosynthesis regulation.

Terminal_Metabolite_Accumulation_Site.reason: Seed coat and TT2-induced hairy roots are relevant PA accumulation sites.

Terminal_Metabolite_Function.reason: General PA functions listed are supported in the introduction.

Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs.reason: It was induced downstream of ectopic TT2 in this study.
